requirements.fixtures: make cuda-verify all seven fixtures (turbo3, turbo4, turbo3_tcq, qjl, polar, polar_qjl, fused_attn_qjl_tbq)

evidence.toolchainInfo: nvcc release 12.0 V12.0.140 (distro nvidia-cuda-toolkit). sm_90/89/86/80 SASS + compute_90 PTX; the 580 driver JIT-compiles the compute_90 PTX to Blackwell sm_120. nvcc 12.0 does not target sm_100/sm_120 directly (CUDA >= 12.8 needed for native Blackwell SASS); cudaArchListFlag() / the verify Makefile gate sm_100/sm_120 SASS on nvcc support, so a 12.8+ rebuild would add native sm_120 SASS on top.

results.qjl: 8/8 PASS, max diff 9.54e-6 (DP4A int8-sketch cross-check: 1.43e-1 round-trip, expected)
results.fused_attn_qjl_tbq: 1920/1920 outputs PASS across 4 GQA/n_kv cases, max diff 3.28e-7

graphDispatch.tool: llama-bench (the fork's llama-cli is conversation-only and busy-loops on stdin EOF; llama-bench is the non-interactive equivalent and exercises the same prompt-eval + token-gen graph passes)

routes.f16 (baseline): backend=CUDA, pp512 6699 t/s, pp4096 2676 t/s, tg128 53.9 t/s
routes.GGML_OP_ATTN_SCORE_TBQ / turbo3 (--cache: backend=CUDA, pp64 1014 t/s, pp512 685 t/s, pp4096 178 t/s, tg128 40.9 t/s
routes.GGML_OP_ATTN_SCORE_TBQ / turbo4 (--cache: backend=CUDA, pp64 1679 t/s, pp512 1097 t/s, tg8 262 t/s

graphDispatch.note: The fork registers turbo3/turbo4 as --cache-type-k storage types (tbq3_0/tbq4_0) but registers QJL / Polar / TBQ3-TCQ as score-side ops (GGML_OP_ATTN_SCORE_QJL/POLAR), not --cache-type-k storage aliases — same as the Vulkan path, where the QJL/Polar built-fork graph route was verified via the vulkan-dispatch-smoke C++ harness, not llama-cli --cache-type-k. The CUDA equivalent of that built-fork numeric op gate is make cuda-verify (the fixture-parity harness ports the same reference algorithm into __device__ kernels operating on the on-disk fixture byte layouts and matched the C references 8/8 / 1920/1920 on the RTX 5080).
